reasoning: XLF +0.75% and XLE +0.96% show strong cyclical/reflation risk-on rotation — two major sectors both exceed 0.5% threshold. Financials strength indicates yield-curve normalization and reduced bank stress, supporting upside. Energy leadership confirms cyclical appetite. However, XLK remains essentially flat at +0.22% (underperforming SPY +0.47%), indicating tech/growth sector lagging. Breadth is narrow: cyclical outperformance is real, but growth weakness limits upside sustainability. Medium-high confidence bullish bias.
key_observations: XLK: +0.22% (flat) — tech lagging SPY; growth sector weakness signals cautious positioning
XLF: +0.75% (up) — financial sector strength; yield-curve support and bank bullishness intact
XLE: +0.96% (strongest) — energy outperforming; cyclical/reflation rotation confirmed over defensive
Overall rotation: Cyclical leadership with financial support, but narrow breadth (tech lagging) suggests upside has structural ceiling until growth rotates back in
